raw_consumer_statement:
Attempted to dispute three transactions with Citi. 

Merchant advertised table top board games on XXXX and I placed three orders for 17 games total. 

XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  {$62.00} It turns out company is well known fraudster ( XXXX ). This name was not associated with the original website that the games were advertised on but appeared in the billing description. Within a few days, the website that was selling the items disappeared off the web. They never sent tracking numbers or invoices. 

I immediately sent in disputes to Citi documenting how this is a known fraudster and despite this being easily verified as a scam, they have denied my dispute and the appeal. 

Merchant provided Citi with fake tracking info which does not match up with 15 board games being shipped. 

Games never arrived, I'm out {$150.00} with no recourse.
